# plot_neuro_vol { #neuroim.plot_neuro_vol }

```python
plot_neuro_vol(
    vol,
    cmap="gray",
    zlevels=None,
    irange=None,
    thresh=(0, 0),
    alpha=1,
    bgvol=None,
    bgcmap="gray",
    figsize=(12, 8),
    *,
    axis=2,
    along=None,
    ncol=3,
    colorbar=True,
    range=None,
    title=None,
)
```

Plot a 3D volume as a world-oriented slice montage.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name | Type | Description | Default |
|------|------|-------------|---------|
| vol | NeuroVol or array-like | 3D volume to display. ``NeuroVol`` inputs use spatial orientation and world extents. | _required_ |
| cmap | str, sequence, or Colormap | Matplotlib colormap, color list, or neuroim alias such as ``"grays"`` or ``"blue-red"``. | ``"gray"`` |
| zlevels | sequence of int | Python slice indices to display. Evenly spaced slices are chosen when omitted. | ``None`` |
| irange, range | ``"robust"``, ``"data"``, tuple, or None | Display limits. ``irange`` is the legacy name; ``range`` is the Pythonic alias. | ``None`` |
| thresh | tuple | Inclusive display threshold used by the legacy overlay path. | ``(0, 0)`` |
| alpha | float | Image alpha. | ``1`` |
| bgvol | NeuroVol or array-like | Optional background underlay on the same grid. | ``None`` |
| bgcmap | str, sequence, or Colormap | Background colormap. | ``"gray"`` |
| figsize | tuple | Figure size in inches. | ``(12, 8)`` |
| axis | int or str | Slice axis: ``0``/``"x"``, ``1``/``"y"``, or ``2``/``"z"``. | ``2`` |
| along | int | neuroim2-style one-based slice axis. Overrides ``axis`` when provided. | ``None`` |
| ncol | int | Number of montage columns. | ``3`` |
| colorbar | bool | Draw a shared colorbar for the displayed layer. | ``True`` |
| title | str | Figure title. | ``None`` |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
|  | matplotlib Figure | The created figure. |
